title: salvia × lavandulacea
intro: Salvia × lavandulacea is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the sage species Salvia officinalis and the lavender species Lavandula angustifolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia × lavandulacea include relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting better sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture for medicinal use, or as a dried herb for culinary purposes.
